page: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU. Storage capabilities include 1890 GB of local disk space, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

In benchmark evaluations, the D32ds_v7 demonstrates strong single-core performance, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core CPU tests and PassMark CPU scores. Single-threaded compression and decompression tasks are highly efficient, with gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reaching top-tier performance in the top 10% category. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks fall within the average range. The processor includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions, which support strong prompt processing speeds in small to medium LLM inference workloads.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D32ds_v7 offers a balanced resource density, combining dedicated compute power, substantial local storage, and standard memory ratios without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. This profile makes it well-suited for relational databases, static web serving, Redis deployments, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require local scratch space and reliable single-threaded performance.
description: The Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It delivers strong single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% in stress-ng and PassMark benchmarks, alongside top-tier single-threaded compression and decompression capabilities. The processor's support for Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512 enables strong prompt processing speeds for small to medium language models. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute resources, the D32ds_v7 is optimized for workloads such as database operations, Redis caching, static web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring fast local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, optimized for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a 32-vCPU general-purpose instance with 128 GB RAM, 1890 GB local storage, and an Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon compute, fast local storage, and strong single-core performance.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128 GB RAM powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated vector and matrix operations
Optimal for databases, Redis caching, and static web serving workloads
